headline: DJ Moore Wins Over Bills Mafia Before Playing
writeup: New Buffalo Bills wide receiver DJ Moore made an immediate splash off the field, buying up his own merchandise at a local mall and giving it away free to fans — a gesture that quickly went viral and earned him massive goodwill from Bills Mafia before he's played a single snap in Buffalo. On the business side, the Bills announced Seneca Resorts & Casinos as a Founding Partner of the new Highmark Stadium, and also partnered with national tailgating company Bullseye for an all-inclusive gameday experience, signaling the franchise's aggressive push to elevate the stadium experience. Meanwhile, new QB coach Bo Hardegree is drawing attention for his 'tough love' approach aimed at helping Josh Allen finally hoist the Lombardi Trophy, while the fan base debates the team's biggest roster concerns heading into a 2026 season loaded with expectations. Damar Hamlin also received positive recognition, being named a finalist for the ESPYS Muhammad Ali Humanitarian of the Year Award.
